attributes.description: Alerts when query queueing is high (>= 5) or the query memory budget is nearly exhausted (< 10 MB unused). Query controller saturation.
attributes.name: [InfluxDB OTel] Query controller saturated

investigation_guide.blob:
## InfluxDB query controller saturated

### What fired
`qc_queueing_active >= 5` or `qc_memory_unused_bytes < 10 MB` during the window.

### Why it matters
The query controller queues queries when resources are tight. Queueing plus exhausted memory budget leads to query timeouts.

### Triage
1. Check for long-running or memory-hungry queries.
2. Inspect concurrent-query limits.

### Remediation
- Kill offending queries.
- Raise concurrency / memory budget.

### Tuning
- Thresholds tune in the query.
